## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for non-trivial logic
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (user-facing changes)
- [ ] Conventional Commit message (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
